payload.answer: I can’t tell who “he” refers to or what “the other one” is. Please clarify before I can suggest a memory update.
repair_options: Specify who “he” refers to and what item or option “the other one” means.
Rewrite the statement with explicit names, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific option].”
If this should not be saved as a memory, choose to discard it.
